top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s Retreating Retail Army Exposes Fresh Market Fragility
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin spent years trying to shed its reputation as a playground for speculative retail traders. Its latest selloff is exposing the tradeoff: Wall Street brought scale and legitimacy, but the retail buyers who once helped absorb sharp declines have largely vanished.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley doubles China humanoid robot shipment forecast as commercialization accelerates
top_signals.summary: Morgan Stanley has sharply raised its outlook for China's humanoid robotics market, as early commercial deployment in real-world scenarios accelerated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The global chip rout, Cerebras earnings, the PGA Tour's next chapter and more in Morning Squawk
top_signals.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

top_signals.title: This art is not AI. It’s intentional glitches carved out of wood.
top_signals.summary: Yoshitoshi Kanemaki's handcarved sculptures have a digital aesthetic, but they are firmly anchored in three-dimensional space.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
